ordering.blurb: lets {d} customers order ahead and track their order
edges: an item is sold out mid-order
Tell the user and suggest a similar item without losing the cart.
Handle sold-out item
As a customer, I want a substitute suggested if an item sells out, so that I still complete my order.

- Detect out-of-stock
- Offer substitute
- Preserve cart
payment fails
Show a clear error and let them retry or switch payment method.
Recover from failed payment
As a customer, I want to retry a failed payment, so that I don't lose my order.

- Detect decline
- Offer retry
- Keep order draft
tasks: Write a {fw} menu screen listing items from GET /menu. Objective: {lang} menu UI. Acceptance: items render, tap adds to cart. Verify: {fw} test passes.
Objective: Create tables in {db}. Add menu_items, orders, order_items with FKs. Acceptance: migration applies. Verify: schema lists 3 tables.
Objective: Write {lang} order-status API. GET /orders/:id/status returns live state. Acceptance: returns queued|making|ready. Verify: curl returns 200 with status.

booking.blurb: lets people book appointments at a {d}
edges: two clients book the same slot
Lock the slot on selection and warn if it's already taken.
Prevent double-booking
As a client, I want to be told if my slot was just taken, so that I can pick another.

- Lock slot on hold
- Detect conflict
- Offer next opening
a client no-shows
Flag no-shows and optionally charge the deposit.
Handle no-shows
As an owner, I want no-shows flagged, so that I can enforce my policy.

- Mark no-show
- Apply deposit rule
- Notify client
tasks: Write a {fw} calendar showing open slots from GET /availability. Objective: {lang} calendar UI. Acceptance: open slots selectable. Verify: {fw} test passes.
Objective: Create tables in {db}. Add services, slots, bookings with a unique constraint on (slot_id). Acceptance: double-book fails. Verify: constraint rejects duplicate.
Objective: Write {lang} booking API. POST /bookings holds a slot and emails confirmation. Acceptance: returns 201, slot locked. Verify: test passes.
